description: Shapeshifters and curse-bearers — werebeasts, mimics, and those who wear other faces.
creatures: Werewolf
A cursed soul that twists into snarling wolf form under the full moon, remembering nothing by dawn.
Werebear
A gentle hermit who becomes a massive, protective bear — one of the few benevolent lycanthropes.
Weretiger
A solitary hunter who shifts into a striped killing machine, stalking prey through jungle and shadow.
Wererat
A sewer-dwelling shapeshifter that spreads filth disease in rat form and runs thieves' guilds in human form.
Wereboar
A snarling brute who shifts into a tusked boar and charges headlong into anything that provokes it.
Wereraven
A secretive lycanthrope with raven form who serves as scout, spy, and omen of things to come.
Wereshark
An ocean-dwelling shapeshifter that becomes a frenzied shark, drawn unstoppably to blood in the water.
Doppelganger
A grey-skinned, featureless mimic that copies faces and memories, replacing people without anyone noticing.
Changeling
A pale, blank-featured being that steals faces and lives, never sure which identity is truly its own.
Mimic
A glistening predator disguised as an object that sprouts teeth and a sticky pseudopod when touched.
Jackalwere
A jackal that takes human form with a hypnotic gaze, luring victims to its waiting pack.
